examples: The rabbits nibbled away on the herbaceous plants.
The long warm rain had done strange things to the herbaceous beds which bordered the walk by the lower wall.
Black fruit flavors combine with herbaceous brambly flavors.
Corcovado has roughly 13 types of vegetation, including a cloud forest, a mangrove and a freshwater herbaceous swamp.
This is an amazing brew for food pairings due to its extra herbaceous bite from the use of White Sage.
